title: calamintha exigua
intro: Calamintha exigua, also known as Small Mint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, pinkish-white flowers and mint-like fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Calamintha exigua include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to make salves and creams for topical application.
